Linq API: auto-share Michael contact card (with image)
results.description:
Implement Linq chat flow to automatically call the share-contact-card endpoint after initial engagement.

Linq API docs:
[Chats | Linq Partner API Docs](https://apidocs.linqapp.com/documentation/chats#post-v3-chats-chatid-share_contact_card)

Target behavior:
- For new conversations, send Michael's contact card with image via POST /v3/chats/{chatId}/share_contact_card.
- Keep logic configurable so it can be enabled/disabled per persona/session rules.

Contact card assets (Everything AI):
- Live vCard URL: https://www.geteverything.ai/r/782a5f7d78d092c3366ec48738e90b1da183a4b0d47d2014/save-michael-contact.vcf
- Live photo URL: https://www.geteverything.ai/r/782a5f7d78d092c3366ec48738e90b1da183a4b0d47d2014/save-michael-contact-photo.png
- Repo path on main: apps/web/public/r/782a5f7d78d092c3366ec48738e90b1da183a4b0d47d2014/save-michael-contact.vcf
- Repo path on main: apps/web/public/r/782a5f7d78d092c3366ec48738e90b1da183a4b0d47d2014/save-michael-contact-photo.png

Verification:
- Add/update E2E test to confirm contact-card share call is made and succeeds for qualifying new chats.
- Log request/response IDs for observability.

results.content: Verify magic link email URLs on alumniofyc.com production
results.description:
Check if magic link emails contain localhost URLs instead of alumniofyc.com.

**Steps:**
1. Go to alumniofyc.com/login and send a magic link to your email
2. Check the email — does the Sign in button URL say [Alumni of YC — Demo Day](https://alumniofyc.com/verify) or http://localhost:3000/verify?
3. If localhost: check Vercel dashboard > Environment Variables > confirm BETTER_AUTH_URL = [Alumni of YC — Demo Day](https://alumniofyc.com) for Production
4. Also check Preview env — it has NO BETTER_AUTH_URL set, so preview deploys will always produce localhost links
5. If Production is correct but email still says localhost, force redeploy: vercel --prod --force

Root cause locations:
- lib/auth.ts:74
- lib/actions/interests.ts:60
